mapper.insert: INSERT INTO POINT (point_id, user_id, policy_key, amount, type, description, created_at) SELECT SEQ_POINT.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, pp.policy_key, pp.amount, CASE WHEN pp.policy_key LIKE 'EARN%' THEN 'EARN' WHEN pp.policy_key LIKE 'USE%' THEN 'USE' END, #{description}, SYSDATE FROM POINT_POLICY pp WHERE pp.policy_key = #{policyKey} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM POINT p WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.policy_key = pp.policy_key )
mapper.select: SELECT point_id, user_id, policy_key, amount, type, description, created_at AS pointLogDate FROM POINT WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT point_id, user_id, policy_key, amount, type, description, created_at AS pointLogDate FROM POINT WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
